CreateDeploySet.name: Deploy set name
CreateDeploySet.desc: Deploy set description, may only contain Chinese characters, letters, digits, dots ".", spaces, underscores "_", hyphens "-", equals signs "=", English commas ",", Chinese commas "，", colons "：", slashes "/" and Chinese periods "。"
CreateDeploySet.strategy: Deploy set strategy (HOST_HA: host machine, RACK_HA: rack, TOR_HA: switch)
